chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. D-1169 of 2024 Date Order with signature of Judge(s) 1. For order on office objection No.32 2. For order on Misc. No.5466/2024 3. For order on Misc. No.5467/2024 4. For hearing of main case 22.10.2025 None present for the petitioners -------------------------------- On 07.3.2024, which is over one and a half years ago, none was present for the petitioners in the first and second round of hearing. Despite lapse of one and a half years, learned counsel for the petitioners has failed to pursue this petition diligently. Today, despite lapse of one and a half years, once again, none present for the petitioners without intimation. In fact the petitioners never appeared in this petition. It appears that the petitioners have lost interest in pursuing this petition, which is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution alongwith listed applications. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Zahid/*
